response.value:
**Organizing project explanation**

I need to provide a detailed explanation of the entire project for beginners covering HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. We have the file contents, so I can use that instead of additional tools. I'll structure it with headings and markdown to keep it organized.

The explanation will include sections like an overview, HTML structure, CSS styling, and JavaScript features. I want to mention each element with its corresponding styles and scripts, highlighting dynamic features like the progress bar, custom cursor, theme control, and various animations. This way, it's clear and concise!

**Detailing CSS elements**

I need to dive into CSS variables and how they work, particularly in the context of root and dark mode classes. Discussing responsive design is also crucial, as it impacts how the project will look and function on different devices. By incorporating these elements, I can make the explanation well-rounded and useful. I’ll take care to outline how these details contribute to the overall aesthetic and usability of the project. Let’s craft this comprehensively!
response.generatedTitle: Organized project explanation and detailed CSS elements

response.value:
## Project Overview

This portfolio site is built from three parts:

-

— interactivity, animations, theme controls, form submission

It creates a one-page portfolio with a fixed header, scrolling sections, custom cursor, animated buttons/cards, dark mode and theme color picker, a progress bar, animated counters, typed text, contact form submission, and more.

---

## HTML (

)

### 1. Page Metadata and External Libraries

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined" rel="stylesheet" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/7.0.1/css/all.min.css" />
<link href="https://unpkg.com/aos@2.3.1/dist/aos.css" rel="stylesheet" />
```

-

is your main stylesheet.
- Google Fonts are used for Material Symbols icons.
- Font Awesome provides social and feature icons.
- AOS is a library for scroll animations.

At the bottom:

```html
<script src="https://unpkg.com/aos@2.3.1/dist/aos.js"></script>
<script src="script.js"></script>
```

- AOS JavaScript initializes scroll animations.
-

contains the custom site behavior. --- ### 2. Progress Bar ```html
``` - This is a thin bar at the top of the page. - It fills as the user scrolls down. --- ### 3. Custom Cursor ```html
``` - A small circle follows the user’s mouse pointer. - Adds a modern interactive effect. --- ### 4. Header / Navigation ```html

``` - Includes a hero headline with dynamic typed text. - Social links use Font Awesome icons. - Buttons link to About and Contact sections. - Profile image on the right. --- ### 6. About Section ```html

@Dagmawi Zemenu. All rights reserved!

``` - Footer text at bottom. - A fixed scroll-to-top button appears after scrolling. --- ## CSS (

makes it look polished, using colors, layout, and animation classes.
3.

adds:
   - scroll animations,
   - custom cursor and progress bar,
   - interactive ripple effects,
   - image loading control,
   - theme customization,
   - animated typed headline,
   - active nav highlighting,
   - contact form submission.

This is a solid beginner portfolio project because it combines:
- Presentation (`HTML`)
- Styling and layout (`CSS`)
- Behavior and animation (`JavaScript`)

If you want, I can also explain one section at a time with a simpler step-by-step walkthrough of how to build it from scratch.

codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
## Project Overview

This portfolio site is built from three parts:

-  — page structure and content
-  — styling, layout, visuals, colors, animations
-  — interactivity, animations, theme controls, form submission

It creates a one-page portfolio with a fixed header, scrolling sections, custom cursor, animated buttons/cards, dark mode and theme color picker, a progress bar, animated counters, typed text, contact form submission, and more.

---

## HTML ()

### 1. Page Metadata and External Libraries

codeBlocks.code:
<script src="https://unpkg.com/aos@2.3.1/dist/aos.js"></script>
<script src="script.js"></script>
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
-  is your main stylesheet.
- Google Fonts are used for Material Symbols icons.
- Font Awesome provides social and feature icons.
- AOS is a library for scroll animations.

At the bottom:

- AOS JavaScript initializes scroll animations.
-  contains the custom site behavior.

---

### 2. Progress Bar

- This is a thin bar at the top of the page.
- It fills as the user scrolls down.

---

### 3. Custom Cursor

codeBlocks.code:
Dagmawi Zemenu menu
...
routine
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- A small circle follows the user’s mouse pointer.
- Adds a modern interactive effect.

---

### 4. Header / Navigation

codeBlocks.code:
Hi, It's Dagmawi

I am a

...

...
...
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Logo links to top of page.
- `menu-icon` is the mobile menu toggle.
- Navigation links scroll to sections.
- Contact button jumps to the contact form.
- Two color pickers allow customizing theme colors.
- `theme-icon` toggles dark/light mode.

---

### 5. Home Section

codeBlocks.code:
...
...
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Includes a hero headline with dynamic typed text.
- Social links use Font Awesome icons.
- Buttons link to About and Contact sections.
- Profile image on the right.

---

### 6. About Section

Goals

...
...

- A two-column layout.
- Image on one side, text and button on the other.

...

- Three cards highlight goals.
- Each card has an icon, title, and description.

---

3+

- Three skill cards with images and text.

...

- Animated counters show numbers.
- Data attributes define target counts.

---

### 10. Contact Section

codeBlocks.code: @Dagmawi Zemenu. All rights reserved!
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- A contact form with hidden Web3Forms access key.
- Displays form result messages in `#result`.

---

### 11. Footer and Scroll Button

- Footer text at bottom.
- A fixed scroll-to-top button appears after scrolling.

---

## CSS ()

### 1. Global Styling

- Resets margins/padding.
- Uses a clean default font.
- Hides default cursor so custom cursor shows instead.
- Smooth scrolling is enabled for anchor links.

---

### 2. CSS Variables

codeBlocks.code: .header { position: fixed; width: 100%; top: 0; left: 0; padding: 2.5rem 15%; background: var(--header-bg); ... }
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Custom properties let the theme colors change globally.
- Dark mode uses a `.darkmode` class to override colors.

---

### 3. Header Styles

codeBlocks.code:
.btn { background-color: var(--main-color); ... }
.gradient-btn { background: linear-gradient(...); ... }
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- The header remains fixed at the top.
- Uses a translucent background and blur effect.

---

### 4. Buttons and Links

codeBlocks.code:
.goal-box:hover { transform: scale(1.03) translateY(-7px) !important; ... }
.skill-card:hover { transform: scale(1.02) translateY(-7px) !important; ... }
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Buttons use the primary and gradient theme colors.
- Hover effects add scale and shadow.

---

### 5. Section Layouts

- `.home`, `.about`, `.goals`, `.skills` each use flex or grid layout.
- `.home` has a two-column hero layout.
- `.goals-container` and `.skills-box` use responsive grids.

---

### 6. Cards and Hover Effects

codeBlocks.code:
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 15px; }
#progressBar { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 5px; background: linear-gradient(...); ... }
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Cards grow slightly and cast glow effects on hover.
- This makes interactions feel dynamic.

---

### 7. Scrollbar and Progress Bar

codeBlocks.code: #customCursor { position: fixed; width: 20px; height: 20px; border: 2px solid var(--main-color); border-radius: 50%; pointer-events: none; ... }
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Custom scrollbar design.
- Progress bar uses gradient and shadow.

---

### 8. Custom Cursor

codeBlocks.code:
.ripple { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); transform: scale(0); animation: ripple-animation 0.6s ease-out; pointer-events: none; }
@keyframes ripple-animation { to { transform: scale(4); opacity: 0; } }
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Fixed circle that follows the mouse.
- `pointer-events: none` ensures it does not block clicks.

---

### 9. Ripple Effect Styles

codeBlocks.code:
@keyframes float { 0%,100% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(-15px); } }
.floating { animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Creates a spreading circle animation on click.
- Works on buttons and cards.

---

### 10. Floating Animation

codeBlocks.code:
img { opacity: 1; transition: opacity 0.5s ease-in; }
img.loading { opacity: 0; }
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Images gently float up and down.
- Adds life to the home and about images.

---

### 11. Loading Images

codeBlocks.code: .counter { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--main-color); }
codeBlocks.markdownBeforeBlock:
- Images start hidden with `.loading`.
- When ready, JavaScript removes `.loading` so they fade in.

---

### 12. Counter Styling

- Counter text is large and bright.
- The JS updates this value as the user scrolls.

---

## JavaScript ()

### 1. AOS Initialization

- Initializes AOS scroll animations.
- `duration: 1000` means animations last 1 second.
- `once: true` means each animation plays only once.

---

### 2. Custom Cursor

- Listens to mouse movement.
- Moves the cursor element to follow the pointer.
- Adds fade in/out when the pointer enters or leaves the window.

---

### 3. Progress Bar on Scroll

- Calculates how far the page has been scrolled.
- Sets the `width` of `#progressBar` accordingly.

---

### 4. Button and Card Ripple Effect

- Adds a click handler to buttons and cards.
- Creates a `<span>` ripple element.
- Positions it at the click point.
- Removes it after the animation completes.

---

### 5. Lazy Loading Images

- Uses `IntersectionObserver` to detect when images enter the viewport.
- Removes the `loading` class so they fade in.
- Stops observing images once visible.

---

### 6. Floating Images

- Adds the predefined floating animation class.
- Makes hero and about images gently move.

---

### 7. Counter Animation

Function:

- Slowly increments number from 0 to target.
- Uses ~60 frames per second style timing.
- Displays a `+` sign after the number.

Observer:

- Starts the count animation when each counter scrolls into view.
- Ensures it only runs once.

---

### 8. Mobile Menu Toggle

- Toggles the navigation menu open/closed on click.
- Changes the icon text from `menu` to `close`.
- Closes the menu when a navigation link is clicked.

---

### 9. Theme Colors and Dark Mode

Initial state:

- Reads saved settings from `localStorage`.
- Sets up color pickers and default colors.

Functions:

- Updates CSS variables so the entire site theme updates instantly.
- Saves selections in browser storage.

Dark mode:

- Toggles between normal and light theme.
- Uses the `.darkmode` class to override root CSS variables.
- Updates the icon text to show `light_mode` or `dark_mode`.

---

### 10. Typing Effect

- Cycles through words one letter at a time.
- Types a word, pauses, deletes it, then types the next word.
- Creates a dynamic hero headline.

---

### 11. Active Navigation Highlight

- Detects which section is currently visible.
- Sets the corresponding nav link to active.
- Helps users know where they are on the page.

---

### 12. Scroll to Top Button

- Button appears after scrolling 300px.
- Click scrolls smoothly back to top.

---

### 13. Contact Form Validation and Submission

renderedUserMessage.text:
AOS.init({ duration: 1000, once: true }); // ===== CUSTOM CURSOR ===== const customCursor = document.getElementById('customCursor'); document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => { customCursor.style.left = e.clientX - 10 + 'px'; customCursor.style.top = e.clientY - 10 + 'px'; }); document.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { customCursor.style.opacity = '1'; }); document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { customCursor.style.opacity = '0'; }); // ===== PROGRESS BAR ===== const progressBar = document.getElementById('progressBar'); window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const scrollHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight; const scrollProgress = (window.scrollY / scrollHeight) * 100; progressBar.style.width = scrollProgress + '%'; }); // ===== BUTTON RIPPLE EFFECT ===== document.querySelectorAll('.btn, .gradient-btn').forEach((button) => { button.addEventListener('click', function (e) { const ripple = document.createElement('span'); ripple.classList.add('ripple'); const rect = this.getBoundingClientRect(); const size = Math.max(rect.width, rect.height); const x = e.clientX - rect.left - size / 2; const y = e.clientY - rect.top - size / 2; ripple.style.width = ripple.style.height = size + 'px'; ripple.style.left = x + 'px'; ripple.style.top = y + 'px'; this.appendChild(ripple); setTimeout(() => ripple.remove(), 600); }); }); // Add ripple to cards document.querySelectorAll('.goal-box, .skill-card, .stat-box').forEach((card) => { card.addEventListener('click', function (e) { const ripple = document.createElement('span'); ripple.classList.add('ripple'); const rect = this.getBoundingClientRect(); const size = Math.max(rect.width, rect.height); const x = e.clientX - rect.left - size / 2; const y = e.clientY - rect.top - size / 2; ripple.style.width = ripple.style.height = size + 'px'; ripple.style.left = x + 'px'; ripple.style.top = y + 'px'; this.appendChild(ripple); setTimeout(() => ripple.remove(), 600); }); }); // ===== LAZY LOADING IMAGES ===== const images = document.querySelectorAll('img'); const imageObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => { entries.forEach((entry) => { if (entry.isIntersecting) { const img = entry.target; img.classList.remove('loading'); observer.unobserve(img); } }); }); images.forEach((img) => { imageObserver.observe(img); }); // ===== FLOATING ANIMATION ===== document.querySelectorAll('.home-img img, .about-img img').forEach((img) => { img.classList.add('floating'); }); // ===== COUNTER ANIMATION ===== function animateCounter(element, target, duration = 2000) { let current = 0; const increment = target / (duration / 16); const counter = setInterval(() => { current += increment; if (current >= target) { element.textContent = target + '+'; clearInterval(counter); } else { element.textContent = Math.floor(current) + '+'; } }, 16); } // Observe for counter const counterObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { entries.forEach((entry) => { if (entry.isIntersecting && !entry.target.dataset.counted) { entry.target.dataset.counted = 'true'; const countValue = parseInt(entry.target.dataset.count) || 5; animateCounter(entry.target, countValue); } }); }); document.querySelectorAll('.counter').forEach((el) => { counterObserver.observe(el); }); // MENU let menuIcon = document.querySelector("#menu-icon"); let navbar = document.querySelector(".navbar"); menuIcon.onclick = () => { navbar.classList.toggle("active"); menuIcon.textContent = menuIcon.textContent.trim() === "menu" ? "close" : "menu"; }; document.querySelectorAll(".navbar a").forEach(link => { link.addEventListener("click", () => { navbar.classList.remove("active"); menuIcon.textContent = "menu"; }); }); // DARK MODE let darkMode = localStorage.getItem("darkmode"); const themeSwitch = document.getElementById("theme-icon"); const themeColorPicker = document.getElementById("theme-color-picker"); const gradientColorPicker = document.getElementById("gradient-color-picker"); const defaultThemeColor = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue("--main-color").trim() || "#0c8aea"; const defaultGradientColor = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue("--gradient-end").trim() || "#1dbdfc"; const setThemeColor = (color) => { document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--main-color", color); document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--gradient-start", color); if (themeColorPicker) themeColorPicker.value = color; localStorage.setItem("themeColor", color); }; const setGradientColor = (color) => { document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--gradient-end", color); if (gradientColorPicker) gradientColorPicker.value = color; localStorage.setItem("gradientColor", color); }; const savedThemeColor = localStorage.getItem("themeColor"); const savedGradientColor = localStorage.getItem("gradientColor"); if (savedThemeColor) { setThemeColor(savedThemeColor); } else if (themeColorPicker) { themeColorPicker.value = defaultThemeColor; } if (savedGradientColor) { setGradientColor(savedGradientColor); } else if (gradientColorPicker) { gradientColorPicker.value = defaultGradientColor; } if (themeColorPicker) { themeColorPicker.addEventListener("input", (e) => { setThemeColor(e.target.value); }); } if (gradientColorPicker) { gradientColorPicker.addEventListener("input", (e) => { setGradientColor(e.target.value); }); } const enableDarkmode = () => { document.body.classList.add("darkmode"); localStorage.setItem("darkmode", "active"); }; const disableDarkmode = () => { document.body.classList.remove("darkmode"); localStorage.removeItem("darkmode"); }; const updateIcon = () => { themeSwitch.textContent = document.body.classList.contains("darkmode") ? "light_mode" : "dark_mode"; }; if (darkMode === "active") enableDarkmode(); updateIcon(); themeSwitch.addEventListener("click", () => { darkMode === "active" ? disableDarkmode() : enableDarkmode(); darkMode = localStorage.getItem("darkmode"); updateIcon(); const savedThemeColor = localStorage.getItem("themeColor"); const savedGradientColor = localStorage.getItem("gradientColor"); if (savedThemeColor) setThemeColor(savedThemeColor); if (savedGradientColor) setGradientColor(savedGradientColor); }); // TYPING EFFECT const words = ["Student", "Learner", "Developer"]; let i = 0; let j = 0; let currentWord = ""; let isDeleting = false; function type() { currentWord = words[i]; if (isDeleting) j--; else j++; document.getElementById("typing-text").textContent = currentWord.substring(0, j); if (!isDeleting && j === currentWord.length) { isDeleting = true; setTimeout(type, 1000); return; } if (isDeleting && j === 0) { isDeleting = false; i = (i + 1) % words.length; } setTimeout(type, isDeleting ? 50 : 100); } type(); // ACTIVE NAV let sections = document.querySelectorAll("section"); let navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar a"); window.addEventListener("scroll", () => { let top = window.scrollY; sections.forEach(sec => { let offset = sec.offsetTop - 150; let height = sec.offsetHeight; let id = sec.getAttribute("id"); if (top >= offset && top < offset + height) { navLinks.forEach(link => { link.classList.remove("active"); }); const activeLink = document.querySelector(".navbar a[href*=" + id + "]"); if (activeLink) { activeLink.classList.add("active"); } } }); }); // SCROLL TO TOP const scrollBtn = document.getElementById("scrollTopBtn"); window.addEventListener("scroll", () => { scrollBtn.style.display = window.scrollY > 300 ? "block" : "none"; }); scrollBtn.addEventListener("click", () => { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" }); }); // FORM VALIDATION const form = document.getElementById('form'); const result = document.getElementById('result'); form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); // Validate form fields const name = form.querySelector('[name="Fullname"]').value.trim(); const email = form.querySelector('[name="Email"]').value.trim(); const message = form.querySelector('[name="message"]').value.trim(); if (!name || !email || !message) { result.innerHTML = "Please fill in all fields."; result.style.display = "block"; return; } const formData = new FormData(form); const object = Object.fromEntries(formData); const json = JSON.stringify(object); result.innerHTML = "Please wait..." result.style.display = "block"; fetch('https://api.web3forms.com/submit', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/json' }, body: json }) .then(async (response) => { let json = await response.json(); if (response.status == 200) { alert("Form submission successful!"); result.innerHTML = json.message; } else { console.log(response); result.innerHTML = json.message; } }) .catch(error => { console.log(error); result.innerHTML = "Something went wrong!"; }) .then(function() { form.reset(); setTimeout(() => { result.style.display = "none"; }, 3000); }); }); My portfolio

About me

I’m someone who likes understanding how things work and then trying to build my own version of them. Over the past months, I’ve been exploring web development, basic programming, and creative work like design and visuals. I enjoy independent learning, but I also value working with others and sharing ideas. My goal is to keep improving step by step, take on new challenges, and develop skills I can use in the real world.

 @import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:ital,wght@0,100;0,200;0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;0,800;0,900;1,100;1,200;1,300;1,400;1,500;1,600;1,700;1,800;1,900&display=swap"); * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; text-decoration: none; scroll-behavior: smooth; font-family: "Poppins"; cursor: none; } :root { --bg-color: #080808; --second-bg-color: #121111; --text-color: white; --main-color: #0c8aea; --gradient-start: #0c8aea; --gradient-end: #1dbdfc; --header-bg: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .darkmode { --bg-color: #ffffff; --second-bg-color: #f5f7f6; --text-color: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.865); --header-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } html { font-size: 60%; overflow-x: hidden; } body { background: var(--bg-color); color: var(--text-color); } .header { position: fixed; width: 100%; top: 0; left: 0; padding: 2.5rem 15%; background: var(--header-bg); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; z-index: 999; } #progressBar { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 4px; background: var(--main-color); z-index: 1100; pointer-events: none; transition: width 0.15s ease-out; } #menu-icon { font-size: 3.5rem; color: var(--main-color); display: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: "Material Symbols Outlined"; font-variation-settings: "FILL" 0, "wght" 400, "GRAD" 0; background: none; -webkit-background-clip: initial; background-clip: initial; } #theme-icon { font-size: 3rem;
